allow: PowerShell(foreach \($f in @\('d:\\Github\\esp32-cam-fpv\\esp32-cam-fpv\\tmp_oculus_rec1.avi','d:\\Github\\esp32-cam-fpv\\esp32-cam-fpv\\tmp_oculus_rec2.avi'\)\) { Write-Output "==== $f ====" ; $fs = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($f\); $buf = New-Object byte[] 256; $n = $fs.Read\($buf, 0, 256\); $fs.Close\(\); \($buf | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' ' })

PowerShell($f = 'd:\\Github\\esp32-cam-fpv\\esp32-cam-fpv\\tmp_oculus_rec1.avi'; $size = \(Get-Item $f\).Length; $fs = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($f\); $fs.Position = 240; $reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader\($fs\); $count = 0; $totalData = 0; while \($fs.Position + 8 -le $size\) { $tag = $reader.ReadBytes\(4\); $tagStr = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($tag\); $sz = $reader.ReadUInt32\(\); if \($tagStr -ne '00dc' -and $tagStr -ne 'idx1'\) { Write-Output "Unknown tag '$tagStr' at offset $\($fs.Position-8\) size=$sz"; break }; if \($tagStr -eq 'idx1'\) { Write-Output "idx1 chunk at $\($fs.Position-8\), size $sz"; break }; $count++; $totalData += $sz; if \($fs.Position + $sz -gt $size\) { Write-Output "Frame $count at offset $\($fs.Position-8\) size=$sz EXCEEDS file \(would end at $\($fs.Position+$sz\), file size $size\)"; break }; $fs.Position += $sz }; Write-Output "Frames found: $count totalData=$totalData lastPos=$\($fs.Position\) fileSize=$size"; $fs.Close\(\))

PowerShell($f = 'd:\\Github\\esp32-cam-fpv\\esp32-cam-fpv\\tmp_oculus_rec2.avi'; $size = \(Get-Item $f\).Length; $fs = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($f\); $fs.Position = 240; $reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader\($fs\); $count = 0; $totalData = 0; while \($fs.Position + 8 -le $size\) { $tag = $reader.ReadBytes\(4\); $tagStr = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($tag\); $sz = $reader.ReadUInt32\(\); if \($tagStr -ne '00dc' -and $tagStr -ne 'idx1'\) { Write-Output "Unknown tag '$tagStr' at offset $\($fs.Position-8\) size=$sz"; break }; if \($tagStr -eq 'idx1'\) { Write-Output "idx1 chunk at $\($fs.Position-8\), size $sz"; break }; $count++; $totalData += $sz; if \($fs.Position + $sz -gt $size\) { Write-Output "Frame $count at offset $\($fs.Position-8\) size=$sz EXCEEDS file \(would end at $\($fs.Position+$sz\), file size $size\)"; break }; $fs.Position += $sz }; Write-Output "Frames found: $count totalData=$totalData lastPos=$\($fs.Position\) fileSize=$size"; $fs.Close\(\))
